localizations.title: 5th Avenue
localizations.hiddenObject_1: Did you take a close look at the origami?
localizations.code_1305: You made it! You're outside with the precious prototype.
localizations.code_3153: You made it! You're outside with the precious prototype.
localizations.code_3513: You made it! You're outside with the precious prototype.
localizations.code_5031: You made it! You're outside with the precious prototype.
localizations.code_9589: The heavy armored door opens. You enter the vault.
localizations.code_1210: You made it! You're outside with the precious prototype.
localizations.hint_5: Have you carefully searched around the building, next to the trash cans?
localizations.hint_8: A crowbar. Essential to force doors and to open crates.
localizations.hint_11: The two animals in the center will provide you with the code in due time: put them back in order.
localizations.hint_15: This hairpin should allow you to pick a lock.
localizations.hint_22: Hurry! You must find a way to open this crate.
localizations.hint_25: Cut off the power to disable the alarm. Watch closely the color of the wires.
localizations.hint_37: This lever perfectly fits the electrical panel connectors.
localizations.hint_42: This grappling hook should allow you to access the Flatiron Building’s floors.
localizations.hint_43: The alarm is no longer power supplied. Add this modifier to Mr. CORC’s portrait.
localizations.hint_44: The 2M4GD Corp. headquarters are on the third floor. You should use a rope to access them.
localizations.hint_58: To open the bookcase, you need a key (or a tool to force the lock).
localizations.hint_73: A piece of paper is missing… but you know you saw it somewhere.
localizations.hint_92: The shelf holds two items. Watch carefully.
localizations.hint_121: The equipment you were promised is here indeed. Take the three indicated tools.
localizations.hint_131: The pattern on the rug will help you find the code: put the animals back in order.
localizations.hint_141: To disable the alarm signal protecting the painting, lower only the correct colors.
localizations.hint_151: By itself, this piece of paper is worthless. Once you've found the other part of the torn page, look at the animals’ numbers.
localizations.hint_161: How would you write LESLIE on a calculator (and without the “7” number)?
localizations.hint_171: How would you write LESLIE on a calculator (and without the “7” number)?
